name: Secure Data Analyst Skill Suite
description: A secure data analysis workflow suite based on MGC Blackbox, providing credential protection, zero-exposure script application, script sealing collaboration, and knowledge management. Also includes a Data Analyst Agent system prompt template (agent_system_prompt.md) for building secure Data Analyst Agents that follow strict authorization rules.
author: MirginCipher Team

agent_template.name: Secure Data Analyst Agent
agent_template.description: A system prompt template for building a secure Data Analyst Agent, all sensitive operations require explicit user authorization.

disclaimers: This skill suite does not provide automated data access capabilities, all scripts must be user-owned.
All sensitive operations require explicit user authorization.
Scripts must comply with organizational security and compliance policies.
